labor_share.basis: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 5239 ($166,457,424,125) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 5239 ($454,212,096,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: ancestor 5239. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_total.basis: QCEW 2024 private annual avg establishments (SUSB out of scope for this code; establishments are a proxy for firms — overcounts multi-unit firms)
